mapper.select: select id, tenant_id, task_type_code, display_name, descriptor::text as descriptor, descriptor_version, source, declared_by_worker_code, status, first_declared_at, last_declared_at from batch.custom_task_type_registry where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and status = 'ACTIVE' order by last_declared_at desc nulls last, id desc
select count(1) from batch.custom_task_type_registry where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and status = 'ACTIVE'
